script.arcTitle: USA v Bosnia and Herzegovina: A Two-Goal Replay
script.openingLine: Welcome to Replay, for USA against Bosnia and Herzegovina at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: USA meet Bosnia and Herzegovina in the round of 32 at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with the two sides meeting in the round of 32.

moments.spokenLine: Folarin BALOGUN scores for USA. The verified score moves to 1–0.
moments.explainer: This is the first verified score change of the match.

moments.spokenLine: USA lead Bosnia and Herzegovina 1–0 at the interval.
moments.explainer: The half closes with USA holding the verified lead.

moments.spokenLine: Folarin BALOGUN is shown a red card for USA.
moments.explainer: A major disciplinary moment arrives for USA.

moments.spokenLine: Player null receives a yellow card for Bosnia and Herzegovina.
moments.explainer: Bosnia and Herzegovina are shown a yellow card.

moments.spokenLine: Malik TILLMAN scores for USA. The verified score moves to 2–0.
moments.explainer: USA extend their verified lead to two goals.
The match ends with USA winning by two goals.

chapters.text: At kick-off, USA meet Bosnia and Herzegovina in the round of 32 at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium.
In the 45th minute, Folarin BALOGUN scores for USA. The verified score moves to 1–0.
At half-time, USA lead Bosnia and Herzegovina 1–0.
In the 64th minute, Folarin BALOGUN is shown a red card for USA.
In the 80th minute, Player null receives a yellow card for Bosnia and Herzegovina.
In the 82nd minute, Malik TILLMAN scores for USA. The verified score moves to 2–0.
At full-time, USA 2–0 Bosnia and Herzegovina.
